name: openclaw-node-package
description: Combined OpenClaw node and plugin package for easy distribution

scripts.build: tsup src/node/index.ts src/node/cli.ts src/plugin/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --target node18 --out-dir dist
scripts.dev: tsup src/node/index.ts src/node/cli.ts src/plugin/index.ts --format esm --watch --out-dir dist

author: OpenClaw
